mapper.select:
WITH RECURSIVE comment_tree AS (SELECT id, task_id, parent_id, content, create_time, create_by, 0 AS LEVEL, CAST( id AS CHAR(200)) AS path FROM `comment`
parent_id = 0
AND task_id = #{taskId}
UNION ALL SELECT c.id, c.task_id, c.parent_id, c.content, c.create_time, c.create_by, ct.LEVEL + 1, CONCAT(ct.path, ',', c.id) AS path FROM `comment` c INNER JOIN comment_tree ct ON c.parent_id = ct.id) SELECT id, task_id, parent_id, content, create_time, create_by, LEVEL, path FROM comment_tree ORDER BY LEVEL, parent_id, create_time
